note: The operator correspondence map: every engineering operator in Sketched traces to a mathematical operator in the paper. 'realized' entries must point at code that exists (checked by tools/operator_audit.py); 'target' entries are design intent and must NOT be presented as shipped. Zero-order labels are human-supplied calibration data (Paul, 2026-07-02).

zero_order_principles.label: localhost
zero_order_principles.math_operator: the void 1̂: unique shared depth-0 condition (lem:void, prop:zeroth)
zero_order_principles.engineering_operator: dev server bound to 127.0.0.1; ZeroOrderAnchor origin check

zero_order_principles.label: browser-platform
zero_order_principles.math_operator: interface medium M through which all transfer factors
zero_order_principles.engineering_operator: the browser as public medium: file ingestion, JSON artifacts, rendering

zero_order_principles.label: json-manifold
zero_order_principles.math_operator: encoded residue E_A(T_A x): what actually crosses the medium

zero_order_principles.label: eula-first-contract
zero_order_principles.math_operator: seating the human at the depth-0 origin (normative move; docs/12)
zero_order_principles.engineering_operator: EULA acceptance recorded in ZeroOrderAnchor before any trace validates

operators.math_operator: condition p: finite partial epistemic state (claim complex K_t)
operators.engineering_operator: Stage state: the layer set + timeline at a tick

operators.math_operator: admissible refinement q ⊑ p retaining commitments
operators.engineering_operator: gatekeeper-accepted Proposal application

operators.math_operator: J_wit finite witness: refinement prefix with certificate, admissibility, provenance, human gate
operators.engineering_operator: WitnessTrace of WitnessedSteps bound from Proposal/ConsentDecision/ProposalResult

operators.math_operator: certificate carried by each witnessed refinement
operators.engineering_operator: ConsentDecision (required/granted/reason)

operators.math_operator: human-gated decision (where required)
operators.engineering_operator: ManualConsentPolicy.grant: explicit per-proposal human approval

operators.math_operator: channel projector T_A (bounded projection; identity breaks here first)
operators.engineering_operator: explicit field whitelist applied before export

operators.math_operator: encode E_A: floor-stable residue onto the medium
operators.engineering_operator: encodeResidue: state → Mark (JSON), loss declared

operators.math_operator: decode D_B: reconstruction inside the reader's surface, never identity
operators.engineering_operator: decodeResidue: Mark → Reconstruction (nominally branded type; not source state)

operators.math_operator: Chalked correctness invariant: provenance, permission, residue type, revision authority; identity refused
operators.engineering_operator: validateMark verdicts

operators.math_operator: J_wit trace validity conditions
operators.engineering_operator: validateTrace verdicts (anchor + per-step certificate/admissibility coherence)

operators.math_operator: witness / certificate ledger along the trace
operators.engineering_operator: append-only AuditLog

operators.math_operator: revision authority (the eraser)
operators.engineering_operator: shake as scoped revocation

operators.math_operator: non-actuation boundary: witness and request only, no autonomous loop closure
operators.engineering_operator: agents propose, the surface disposes; no agent mutates core state

operators.math_operator: path-form margin: anchor minus cumulative drift remains above the interval floor
operators.engineering_operator: Flow channel meters derived from anchor, cumulative event cost, and finite budget

operators.math_operator: bounded admissible refinement within a channel-margin interval
operators.engineering_operator: FlowChannel: finite lease, angle, cumulative budget, and explicit closure

operators.math_operator: finite witnessed refinement prefix
operators.engineering_operator: exported flow trace replay, invariant validation, and final-state digest

operators.math_operator: revision authority follows dependent residue while preserving the authority-origin
operators.engineering_operator: human interrupt closes flow, rewinds its root, and removes its dependency closure

operators.math_operator: Stab(q, φ): atomic stabilization under admissible refinement
operators.engineering_operator: a contribution 'holds' when its stabilizers are witnessed and consented (interpretation; not shipped)

operators.math_operator: ∧ connective realization: certificate combination
operators.engineering_operator: precedence / conflict arbitration between overlapping proposals (docs/11)

operators.math_operator: ∨ connective realization: admissible-cover branching
operators.engineering_operator: branching proposals over an undecided region (docs/11; arbitration's dual)

operators.math_operator: torsion certificate: refusal stable under EVERY refinement (atomic case, discharged)
operators.engineering_operator: the human-layer guard inside every ConsentPolicy: 'consent cannot be granted' — permanent and structural, unlike a contingent denial awaiting consent

operators.math_operator: observer completion (P_O, d_O): Cauchy-generic limit of the session
operators.engineering_operator: session persistence / timeline completion (Principia interface; outside Sketched's scope)

operators.math_operator: admissible dense requirement D ∈ D_adm (obligation the observer must eventually meet)
operators.engineering_operator: standing obligation queue for the stage (not designed yet)

operators.math_operator: channel-margin subposet P_H^η: the admissible region + authority to move in it
operators.engineering_operator: Channel grant / angular access (docs/11); exit = return to zero-point

operators.math_operator: control forcing / forced integration at the conflict threshold
operators.engineering_operator: two-knob coordinated co-motion authorizing new content (docs/11)
